input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Mount Sinai Hospital. There are 9 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "gi", "count": 3, "message": "3 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 3, "message": "3 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 600, "current_utilization": 10, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: []. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Mount Sinai has 9 incoming patients, including clusters of 3 GI patients (activate infection control protocol) and 3 neuro patients (ensure stroke code readiness). The capacity outlook is stable for the next 2 hours, with no diversions recommended. Please ensure appropriate protocols are activated for the identified clusters.
